name: superpapers
description: Marketplace for the superpapers plugin — empirical quantitative research for Claude Code

plugins.name: superpapers
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for empirical quantitative research — brainstorm, plan, execute academic papers with replication-driven discipline. Covers literature search, data collection, statistical modeling, robustness, and journal submission. Field-agnostic: economics, political science, epidemiology, sociology, and more.
